dashboard.label: pfSense Host Investigator
dashboard.description: Investigate a specific host across pfSense filterlog events.

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:filterlog | eval src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip,src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip,dest) | `pfsense_enrich_dns` | eval host_ip=src_ip_norm, host_label=coalesce(src_host, src_host_lookup, src_ip_norm) | append [ search `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:filterlog | eval src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip,src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip,dest) | `pfsense_enrich_dns` | eval host_ip=dest_ip_norm, host_label=coalesce(dest_host, dest_host_lookup, dest_ip_norm) ] | eval is_internal=if(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", host_ip) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", host_ip) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", host_ip) OR cidrmatch("127.0.0.0/8", host_ip) OR cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", host_ip) OR cidrmatch("fc00::/7", host_ip) OR cidrmatch("::1/128", host_ip), 1, 0) | where is_internal=1 AND isnotnull(host_ip) AND host_ip!="" | where NOT cidrmatch("fe80::/10", host_ip) AND NOT cidrmatch("ff00::/8", host_ip) AND NOT cidrmatch("169.254.0.0/16", host_ip) | eval show_ipv6=if("$show_ipv6$"="1", 1, 0) | where show_ipv6=1 OR NOT match(host_ip, ":") | stats count as hits values(host_label) as host_labels by host_ip | eval host_label=mvindex(host_labels, 0) | sort - hits | eval host_value=host_ip | append [| makeresults | eval host_value="*", host_label="All (Internal)"] | eval sort_key=if(host_value="*", "0", "1") | sort sort_key host_label | fields host_label host_value

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | stats count

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | eval peer=if(src_ip_norm=host_tok, dest_display, src_display) | stats dc(peer) as unique_peers

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | stats count(eval(action_norm="blocked")) as blocked, count as total | eval pct=round(blocked/total*100,2) | fields pct

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | timechart span=5m count by action_norm

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | where src_ip_norm=host_tok | stats count by dest_display | sort - count | head 10

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | where dest_ip_norm=host_tok | stats count by src_display | sort - count | head 10

panel.title: Top Destination Ports (services used by this host)

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | lookup pfsense_application_protocols dest_port as dest_port_norm transport as transport_norm OUTPUT app | `pfsense_port_labels` | eval port_label=if(isnotnull(app), dest_port_label." (".app.")", dest_port_label) | stats count by port_label | sort - count | head 10

panel.title: Top Apps (services used by this host)

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | lookup pfsense_application_protocols dest_port as dest_port_norm transport as transport_norm OUTPUT app | eval app_norm=coalesce(app, app_norm, "Unknown") | stats count by app_norm | sort - count | head 10

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | addinfo | eval peer=case(src_ip_norm=host_tok, dest_display, dest_ip_norm=host_tok, src_display), direction=case(src_ip_norm=host_tok, "outbound", dest_ip_norm=host_tok, "inbound") | stats count as connections, sum(bytes_norm) as bytes, dc(dest_port_norm) as unique_ports, max(info_min_time) as info_min_time, max(info_max_time) as info_max_time by peer, direction | eval bytes_mb=round(bytes/1024/1024,2) | eval duration_hours=(info_max_time-info_min_time)/3600 | eval connections_per_hour=if(duration_hours>0, round(connections/duration_hours,2), 0) | eval bytes_per_connection_mb=if(connections>0, round(bytes_mb/connections,3), 0) | fields peer direction connections connections_per_hour bytes_mb bytes_per_connection_mb unique_ports | sort - connections | head 20

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | eval rule_label=coalesce(rule_name, rule) | stats count by rule_label action_norm | rename action_norm as action | sort - count | head 20

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | eval connection_id=src_display.":".dest_display.":".dest_port_norm | stats min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen, count as events, sum(bytes_norm) as bytes by connection_id, src_display, dest_display, dest_port_norm | eval duration=last_seen-first_seen, duration_min=round(duration/60,1), bytes_mb=round(bytes/1024/1024,2) | where duration>60 | sort - duration | head 20 | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | fields src_display dest_display dest_port_norm events bytes_mb duration_min first_seen last_seen

panel.title: Blocked Connection Attempts for This Host

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | search action_norm="blocked" | eval rule_label=coalesce(rule_name, rule) | stats count as blocked_count by src_display, dest_display, dest_port_norm, rule_label | sort - blocked_count | head 20

panel.title: Raw Events (most recent 10, up to 100 total)

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval host_tok=if("$host$"="", "*", "$host$") | where host_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=host_tok OR dest_ip_norm=host_tok OR src_display=host_tok OR dest_display=host_tok | eval src_ip=src_display, dest_ip=dest_display, dest_port=dest_port_norm | sort - _time | head 100 | table _time action direction transport src_ip dest_ip dest_port app_norm rule_name rule reason bytes
